personalInfo.title: Personal Information
personalInfo.intro: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including:
items: Account information (name, email address, password)
Resume content and files you upload for analysis
Payment information (processed securely by third-party payment processors)
Communication preferences and correspondence with us

autoCollected.title: Automatically Collected Information
autoCollected.intro: When you use our service, we automatically collect certain information, including:
items: Device information (IP address, browser type, operating system)
Usage data (pages visited, features used, time spent on site)
Analytics data to improve our service
Cookies and similar tracking technologies

dataUsage.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
dataUsage.intro: We use the information we collect to:
items: Provide, maintain, and improve our resume analysis service
Process your resume files and deliver AI-powered analysis results
Create and manage your user account
Process payments and prevent fraud
Send you service updates, security alerts, and administrative messages
Respond to your comments, questions, and customer service requests
Analyze usage patterns to improve user experience
Comply with legal obligations and enforce our terms of service

dataSharing.title: 3. Sharing Your Information
dataSharing.intro: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information in the following situations:

items.label: Service Providers
items.description: With third-party vendors who perform services on our behalf (cloud hosting, payment processing, analytics)

items.label: Legal Requirements
items.description: When required by law or to protect our rights and safety

items.label: Business Transfers
items.description: In connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets

items.label: With Your Consent
items.description: When you explicitly authorize us to share specific information

dataSharing.footer: All third-party service providers are contractually obligated to maintain the confidentiality and security of your information.

dataSecurity.title: 4. Data Security
dataSecurity.intro: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information, including:
items: Encryption of data in transit (TLS/SSL) and at rest
Regular security audits and vulnerability assessments
Access controls and authentication mechanisms
Secure backup and disaster recovery procedures
Employee training on data protection and privacy
dataSecurity.footer: However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to protect your personal information, we cannot guarantee absolute security.

cookies.title: 5. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
cookies.intro: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to:
items: Maintain your login session and preferences
Understand how you use our service
Improve site performance and user experience
Deliver relevant content and advertisements

items.label: Performance Cookies
items.description: Help us understand how visitors interact with our site

items.label: Analytics Cookies
items.description: Collect information about site usage patterns

cookies.footer: You can control cookies through your browser settings. However, disabling cookies may limit your ability to use certain features of our service.

userRights.title: 6. Your Privacy Rights
userRights.intro: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights regarding your personal information:

items.label: Access
items.description: Request a copy of the personal information we hold about you

items.label: Correction
items.description: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete information

items.label: Deletion
items.description: Request deletion of your personal information

items.label: Portability
items.description: Request transfer of your data to another service

items.label: Objection
items.description: Object to processing of your personal information

items.label: Restriction
items.description: Request restriction of processing in certain circumstances

items.label: Withdraw Consent
items.description: Withdraw consent for data processing where consent was the basis

userRights.footerPrefix: To exercise these rights, please contact us at
userRights.footerSuffix: . We will respond to your request within 30 days.

dataRetention.title: 7. Data Retention
dataRetention.intro: We retain your personal information for as long as necessary to:
items: Provide you with our services
Comply with legal obligations
Resolve disputes and enforce our agreements
dataRetention.footer: When you delete your account, we will delete or anonymize your personal information within 90 days, except where we are required by law to retain certain information for longer periods.

children.title: 8. Children's Privacy
children.content: Our service is not intended for children under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 16. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us immediately.

changes.title: 9. Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.intro: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we make changes, we will revise the "Last updated" date at the top of this policy. We will notify you of any material changes by:
items: Posting a notice on our website
Sending you an email notification
Displaying a prominent notice within our service
changes.footer: We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically to stay informed about how we protect your information.

contact.title: 10. Contact Us
contact.intro: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:
